title: Create Accounts/Contacts with 'Make' (Integromat) or via API

posts.author: RoshanRai (Roshan Rai)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All,

I am new to monday and would like some help with one of the integration I am trying to do.
Is it possible using ‘Make’ (integromat) to get data of organization or contacts and create that organization or contacts in Monday.com?

Many Thanks
